name: zimage_texdir_find_or_create_by_path
description: zImage::TexDir_FindOrCreateByPath tries builtin texture packs, then regular texture packs, and returns null when an image is missing.
known_limits: Binary-safe evidence is available from python tools/recoil_vc6_verify.py zimage_init_helpers: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4, 0 unmasked byte mismatches, 12 relocation-masked bytes, BN size 53, VC object size 64, 11 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
